low_risk_context: Lean workflow: keep the main thread as the orchestrator, stay narrow, and implement directly unless the scope expands.
medium_risk_context: Lean workflow: use architect only if you need sequencing or acceptance criteria, keep implementation single-writer, and use reviewer or qa-ux only when the risk surface justifies it.
visible_ui_context: Visible UI work: use Hume only if design direction is still unresolved or the user explicitly wants design review; for interaction bugs, verify the real user path in the launched app before claiming success.
high_risk_context: Higher-risk work: confirm runtime and source alignment first, keep implementation single-writer, and use reviewer or qa-ux before closeout when the risk surface justifies it.
